title: Apple Enters the AI Era with Major Siri Update
subtitle: The tech giant introduces 'Siri AI' to compete with modern chatbots and improve user experience.

summary.en: Apple has officially announced a significant update to its digital assistant, Siri, incorporating new artificial intelligence features. The company aims to make Siri more conversational and helpful by integrating it deeply into its various operating systems. While the update promises to personalize help for users, it will not be available in all regions immediately due to international regulations. Experts suggest that the success of these changes depends on how naturally they fit into daily device use. Apple emphasizes that its approach focuses on user privacy and practical utility rather than just following industry trends.
summary.zh: 蘋果正式宣布對其數位助理 Siri 進行重大更新，整合了新的人工智慧功能。該公司旨在透過將 Siri 深度整合至各項作業系統中，使其更具對話感且更實用。雖然此次更新承諾為使用者提供個人化協助，但受限於國際法規，並非所有地區都能立即使用。專家認為，這些變革的成功與否，取決於它們融入日常裝置使用的自然程度。蘋果強調，其策略著重於使用者隱私與實用性，而非單純追隨產業趨勢。

paragraphs.en: Apple has officially entered the artificial intelligence era. At its annual Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) in Cupertino, California, the company announced a long-awaited update to its digital assistant, Siri. This new version, called 'Siri AI,' is designed to be more conversational and better at performing complex tasks than the original version. The update comes after many months of delays, which had led some people to question if Apple was falling behind other technology companies that have already released advanced AI chatbots.
paragraphs.zh: 蘋果（Apple）已正式邁入人工智慧時代。在加州古柏迪諾（Cupertino）舉辦的年度全球開發者大會（WWDC）上，該公司宣布了數位助理 Siri 長期以來備受期待的更新。這個名為「Siri AI」的新版本，旨在比原始版本更具對話感，且更擅長執行複雜任務。此次更新是在經歷數月的延宕後才發布，這曾讓部分人士質疑蘋果是否落後於其他早已推出先進人工智慧聊天機器人的科技公司。

paragraphs.en: During the event, Apple executives explained that the new Siri will be able to do much more than answer simple questions. According to NPR News, the assistant will be accessible through a standalone app, the search function on home screens, and various other apps like Photos. It will be able to use information from a user’s personal emails, text messages, and photos to provide helpful answers. For example, a user could ask Siri to find an address mentioned in a text message, look up a recipe, and then create a calendar event, all without needing to switch between different apps manually.
paragraphs.zh: 在活動期間，蘋果高層解釋說，新版 Siri 的功能將遠不止於回答簡單問題。根據美國公共廣播電台（NPR News）報導，使用者將能透過獨立應用程式、主畫面的搜尋功能，以及照片等各種其他應用程式來使用該助理。它將能運用使用者個人電子郵件、簡訊和照片中的資訊來提供實用的解答。例如，使用者可以要求 Siri 找出簡訊中提到的地址、查詢食譜，然後建立行事曆活動，全程無需手動在不同應用程式之間切換。

paragraphs.en: Craig Federighi, Apple’s senior vice president for software design, defended the company’s approach during the presentation. He noted that while other companies are racing to release AI products, Apple is focusing on what is actually useful for the individual. 'We believe that truly helpful AI must be centered around you and your needs,' Federighi said. According to Ars Technica, the company demonstrated this by showing how Siri AI can handle multi-step requests, such as planning a watch party menu based on information found in previous conversations with friends.
paragraphs.zh: 蘋果軟體設計資深副總裁克雷格·費德里吉（Craig Federighi）在發表會中為公司的策略辯護。他指出，儘管其他公司正競相推出人工智慧產品，但蘋果專注於對個人真正有用的功能。費德里吉表示：「我們相信，真正有幫助的人工智慧必須以您和您的需求為核心。」根據科技媒體 Ars Technica 報導，該公司透過展示 Siri AI 如何處理多步驟請求來證明這一點，例如根據與朋友先前對話中找到的資訊來規劃一場觀影派對的菜單。

paragraphs.en: Beyond the voice assistant, Apple is bringing AI features to its entire ecosystem. The Verge reports that the new operating systems, including iOS 27 and macOS 27, will feature tools to help users edit images, write text, and manage open webpages in the Safari browser. The company has also worked with Google to build new 'Foundation Models'—the basic systems that power AI capabilities—to ensure the technology works smoothly across devices like the iPhone, iPad, and Mac. In the Mail app, for instance, the software will offer better suggestions and allow users to add events to their calendars just by describing them in plain language.
paragraphs.zh: 除了語音助理之外，蘋果正將人工智慧功能導入其整個生態系統。科技媒體 The Verge 報導，包括 iOS 27 和 macOS 27 在內的新作業系統，將具備協助使用者編輯影像、撰寫文字以及管理 Safari 瀏覽器中開啟網頁的工具。該公司也與 Google 合作打造新的「基礎模型」（Foundation Models）——即驅動人工智慧能力的基礎系統——以確保這項技術能在 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac 等裝置上順暢運作。例如在郵件應用程式中，該軟體將提供更好的建議，並允許使用者僅透過口語描述，就能將活動加入行事曆。

paragraphs.en: Industry experts have mixed feelings about the announcement. Ben Bajarin, CEO of the research company Creative Strategies, told NPR News that the update looks like a 'pretty big upgrade' because it fits into things people already do. However, he added that the true test will be how the technology actually works once the public begins using it. Francisco Jeronimo, an analyst at IDC, suggested that Apple’s goal is to make AI 'disappear into the operating system.' He explained that if Apple succeeds in making these tools feel natural and private, it could change what people expect from their devices.
paragraphs.zh: 產業專家對此宣布持保留態度。研究公司 Creative Strategies 的執行長班·巴賈林（Ben Bajarin）告訴 NPR News，這次更新看起來是個「相當大的升級」，因為它融入了人們既有的使用習慣。然而，他也補充說，真正的考驗將是大眾開始使用後，這項技術的實際運作情況。IDC 分析師法蘭西斯科·傑羅尼莫（Francisco Jeronimo）則認為，蘋果的目標是讓人工智慧「隱形於作業系統之中」。他解釋說，如果蘋果能成功讓這些工具感覺自然且具隱私性，這可能會改變人們對裝置的期待。

paragraphs.en: Despite the excitement, the rollout will not be immediate for everyone. Apple confirmed that Siri AI will be available to customers in the United States later this year in English, with support for other languages coming in the future. However, the company noted that the technology will not be available right away in the European Union or China due to international regulations. This is a significant limitation, as these are two of the largest markets for Apple products.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管外界感到興奮，但並非所有人都能立即使用這些功能。蘋果證實，Siri AI 將於今年稍晚在美國以英文版本提供給客戶，其他語言的支援將於未來推出。然而，該公司指出，由於國際法規限制，這項技術無法立即在歐盟或中國使用。這是一項重大限制，因為這兩個地區是蘋果產品最大的市場之一。

paragraphs.en: Following the announcement, Apple’s share price fell by nearly 2%. Some analysts believe this shows that investors are waiting to see if these new features will truly be a hit with everyday consumers. Because the bar for improvement was low—given that the original Siri had limited functionality—the pressure is on Apple to prove that its version of AI is better than the competition. As the company prepares to release these updates this fall, the tech world will be watching closely to see if Apple can successfully redefine the relationship between users and their personal devices.
paragraphs.zh: 在宣布消息後，蘋果股價下跌了近 2%。部分分析師認為，這顯示投資人正在觀望這些新功能是否真的能受到一般消費者的歡迎。由於原始 Siri 的功能有限，導致改進的標準門檻較低，蘋果面臨著必須證明其人工智慧版本優於競爭對手的壓力。隨著該公司準備在今年秋季發布這些更新，科技界將密切關注蘋果是否能成功重新定義使用者與個人裝置之間的關係。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To make less progress than others; to be slower in development than competitors.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見於實體移動，這裡指在科技競爭中落後。文中：The update comes after many months of delays, which had led some people to question if Apple was falling behind other technology companies that have already released advanced AI chatbots.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To deal with, manage, or process a task or situation.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（把手），這裡作動詞指處理複雜任務。文中：According to Ars Technica, the company demonstrated this by showing how Siri AI can handle multi-step requests, such as planning a watch party menu based on information found in previous conversations with friends.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A person or thing that is very popular or successful.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 非常成功或受歡迎的人事物。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（打擊），這裡作名詞指受歡迎的產品。文中：Some analysts believe this shows that investors are waiting to see if these new features will truly be a hit with everyday consumers.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A standard or level of expectation that must be reached.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（酒吧或長條物），這裡指期待的標準。文中：Because the bar for improvement was low—given that the original Siri had limited functionality—the pressure is on Apple to prove that its version of AI is better than the competition.

sources.name: NPR News
sources.title: Hey, Siri: Apple just announced a long-awaited AI update

sources.name: Ars Technica
sources.title: Say hi to "Siri AI"—Apple announces new, more "conversational" voice assistant

quiz.question: According to the article, what is one specific way the new Siri AI can assist a user with their schedule?

options.A: It can automatically book flights based on emails.
options.B: It can create a calendar event after looking up a recipe.
options.C: It can send text messages to friends to confirm a party time.
options.D: It can manually switch between different apps for the user.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第二段，文中舉例說明使用者可以要求 Siri 查詢食譜並隨後建立日曆活動（create a calendar event），且無需手動切換應用程式。選項 A 文中未提及機票預訂；選項 C 雖然提到派對菜單，但並未提及發送確認簡訊；選項 D 錯誤，因為 Siri 是透過整合資訊來避免使用者手動切換，而非由 Siri 幫忙「操作」切換。

quiz.question: Based on the article, why might Apple’s stock price have dropped after the announcement?

options.A: Investors are worried about the partnership with Google.
options.B: The new features will not be available in the EU or China.
options.C: The market remains skeptical about whether these features will satisfy consumers.
options.D: Apple failed to demonstrate any multi-step requests during the presentation.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章最後一段，投資人股價下跌反映出他們正在觀望（waiting to see）這些新功能是否真的能受到大眾消費者歡迎，且蘋果面臨證明其 AI 優於競爭對手的壓力。選項 A 文中未提及投資人對 Google 合作的擔憂；選項 B 雖然是事實，但文章將股價下跌直接歸因於投資人對產品成功與否的觀望；選項 D 錯誤，因為文章第三段明確提到蘋果展示了多步驟請求處理的能力。

quiz.question: In the fifth paragraph, what does the phrase 'disappear into the operating system' imply about Apple's goal?

options.A: To make AI features so intuitive that they feel like a natural part of the device.
options.B: To hide the AI tools so that users cannot find them easily.
options.C: To remove the need for an operating system entirely.
options.D: To ensure that the AI only works when the device is turned off.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。在此語境中，「disappear into」並非指消失不見，而是指技術整合得非常完美，以至於使用者在使用時感覺不到「AI 軟體」的存在，而是覺得這些功能本來就是系統的一部分。選項 B 錯誤，因為目標是讓工具更實用；選項 C 不合邏輯；選項 D 與文章強調 AI 提升裝置效能的初衷完全相反。

quiz.question: What is the primary focus of the article regarding Apple's latest announcement?

options.A: A detailed technical manual on how to use the new Siri AI features.
options.B: A comparison of AI chatbots between Apple, Google, and other companies.
options.C: An overview of Apple's strategic entry into the AI era and the challenges it faces.
options.D: A report on the legal battles Apple is currently facing in the European Union.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。本文全面報導了蘋果在 WWDC 發布 Siri AI 的消息，涵蓋了新功能介紹、公司策略（以使用者為中心）、市場反應以及面臨的挑戰（如區域限制與投資人壓力），這正是文章的核心主旨。選項 A 過於細節；選項 B 僅為文章部分內容，非主旨；選項 D 僅是文章提到的其中一個限制因素，並非全文重點。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
